member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataObject
member.summary: Interface for all data loader operations.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataObject.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Returns next hierarchy level data loader object if exist.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataObject.ClearData
member.summary: Clears the data being held in this StringParsedMetadata object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataObject.SetData(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Load a list of values into this object.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataGetData
member.summary: Operations to get data from the StringParsedMetadata object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataGetData.GetUddTokens
member.summary: Get a list of UddTokens records required.
member.returns: List of UddRecords in format (TOD_[name], [record data]).

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataGetData.GetStrgvalValue
member.summary: Get the strgval string for this object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.IStringParsedMetadataGetData.GetMsUnitValue
member.summary: Get msunit string for this object.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdAscendIndexList
member.summary: Defines a list of level descriptors, column header is auto-generated by index in Ascending order. Formatted as "[Name]@F[digit]...[digit]".

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdAscendIndexList.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The start index string. Forcing numeric value and number of digits.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdAscendIndexList.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdAscendIndexList)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase
member.summary: Base class for all SPM elements.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Valid Separators chars: - Alpha: a-z, A-Z - Digit: 0-9 - Special: [ ] ( ) { } - , ; ! $ # @ : - Other: Ascii(32)..Ascii(126) .
member.param: First separator, between any KeyValue pairs.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Valid Separators chars: - Alpha: a-z, A-Z - Digit: 0-9 - Special: [ ] ( ) { } - , ; ! $ # @ : - Other: Ascii(32)..Ascii(126) .
member.param: First separator, between any KeyValue pairs.
Second separator. between any values pairs.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this SPM object.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.FirstSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets the first separator char of this SPM object.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.SecondSeparatorChar
member.summary: Gets the second separator char of this SPM object.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Obtain a Data loader for this SPM object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.ClearData
member.summary: Clear the data items in this SPM object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.SetData(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Set data to this SPM list object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase.ValidateSeparatorChar(System.String)
member.summary: Validate char against: ascii(32)..ascii(126) except from '/'.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDescendIndexList
member.summary: Defines a list of level descriptors, column header is auto-generated by index in descending order. Formatted as "[Name]@R[digit]...[digit]".

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
Name of this list. The data separator. /// The start index string. Forcing numeric value and number of digits.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDescendIndexList.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDescendIndexList)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDictionary
member.summary: Dictionary SPM object. [key] [firstSeparatorChar] [valueKey] [secondSeparatorChar] [ValueValue].

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDictionary.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Separator char within a key and its value.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDictionary.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDictionary)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdDictionary.ValueLevelDescriptor
member.summary: Gets or sets a nested level descriptor.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase
member.summary: Defines a list of level descriptors, column header is auto-generated by index. Formatted as "[Name]@F[digit]...[digit]".

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
List name. Data separator. Any char other than '/'. /// Starting index.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase.Direction
member.summary: Index direction.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase.Direction.Ascending
member.summary: Index goes up.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase.Direction.Descending
member.summary: Index goes down.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdIndexListBase.ListDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets the list direction.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdNamedList
member.summary: NamedList SPM object. Formatted as "![Name]" on the msUnit attribute while [Name] is a UDD TOD type definition.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdNamedList.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of this NamedList (with TOD UDD definition).
Any char other than '/' to separate values between columns.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdNamedList.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of this NamedList (with TOD UDD definition).
Any char other than '/' to separate values between columns.
The second separator char other than '/'.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdNamedList.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdNamedList)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper
member.summary: Helper class for StringParsedMetadata datalog format.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.TypeSpec
member.summary: OptionalTypeSpec enumerator.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.TypeSpec.String
member.summary: String Data type

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.TypeSpec.Double
member.summary: Double Data type

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.TypeSpec.Integer
member.summary: Integer Data type

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.OptionalTypeSpec
member.summary: Gets or sets the OptionalTypeSpec. Defaults to String.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.Create(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create an StringParsedMetadata helper class with a specific topLevelDescriptor.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.Create(Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.LevelDescriptors.LdBase,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create an StringParsedMetadata helper class with a specific topLevelDescriptor.
member.param: The instance name used to datalog this StringParsedMetadata object data. If not provided use current instance name.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.ClearUddTokens
member.summary: Clears UDD tokens of the current instance.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.GetItuffFromData
member.summary: Format the data elements held inside this object, based on the object structure definition. Returns the List of tokens to be send to datalogService.
member.returns: List of IStrgvalFormatters to be printed to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.GetItuffFromDataStrgvalFormat
member.summary: Format the data elements held inside this object, based on the object structure definition. Returns the List of tokens to be send to datalogService.
member.returns: List of IStrgvalFormatters to be printed to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.GetSetTestContinuationSpecification(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the test continuation string based on the incoming data string length and the max line size.
member.returns: The StringParsedMetadata test continuation string to be included in the StringParsedMetadata descriptor line.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataHelper.UploadUddTokensToDatalogService
member.summary: Upload UDD records for this StringParsedMetadata object to datalog service level 4 stage. Aggregate/Distinct the records across the TP.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataSpecConstants
member.summary: Provide a single source for SPM spec constants.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataSpecConstants.UddTypeMaxField
member.summary: For NamedList, the maximum number of columns in a single uddtype record.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataSpecConstants.ValidSeparatorCharRegEx
member.summary: Valid regex for separator chars.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataSpecConstants.HierarchySeparator
member.summary: Special character for hierarchy separator, not allowed for data.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.StringParsedMetadataHelper.StringParsedMetadataSpecConstants.ValidNameRegEx
member.summary: Valid names for lists regex.
